hero.intro: Aldi Fahrizaldi—web developer and music producer. I build clear digital products with Nuxt and Laravel, with the same care I bring to composing beats.
hero.toolsHelp:
Press keys. Make noise.
Both are interactive.

works.title: Portfolio
works.description: Nine projects. Each one built around a real constraint.

about.label: ONE PRACTICE
about.note: Five years in. Two studios. One caffeine source.
about.marquee: OPEN TO FREELANCE · REMOTE FRIENDLY · BASED IN BANJARMASIN · FAST DELIVERY · LET'S TALK ·

contact.label: LET'S TALK
contact.title: Have an idea?
contact.description: Open to freelance projects, collaborations, and interesting conversations about web or music.

music.label: Sound Lab
music.title: Beats & Productions
music.description: Trap, EDM, and free FLP packs—all produced in FL Studio. Available for licensing, content use, or just listening.

laporku.short: Financial reporting app for small business owners—understand your numbers without knowing accounting.

agrika-gatya-arum.short: Premium landing page for a birdnest export company, built to convert international buyers on first visit.

agafood.short: One POS system running two restaurants—Takemori and Soondobu—in Banjarmasin.

jenerymf-tools.short: Body measurement calculator for industrial sizing. Fast, accurate, built for field use.

aldi-teori.short: A knowledge base for historical figures and civilizations. Structured, searchable, built for learners.

translation-app.short: Indonesian ↔ Dayak language translator, preserving a language with almost no digital presence.

circle-english-course.short: Enrollment and learning platform for an English course in Muara Teweh, Central Kalimantan.

english-for-wetlands.short: Bilingual wetlands vocabulary app for researchers and conservationists working in Kalimantan.

kasir-ok.short: Local-first POS for small shops—fast checkout, stock control, profit reports, and store backup in one app.

service.label: Service
service.title: Let's build something.
service.intro: I take on freelance web projects—landing pages, web apps, POS systems, and custom tools. Remote. Fast. No nonsense.

services.title: Landing Page / Company Profile
services.for: Businesses that need a professional web presence
services.includes: Design, development, responsive layout, basic SEO setup

services.title: Web App / Internal System
services.for: Businesses that need custom software—POS, inventory, dashboards, management tools
services.includes: Requirement analysis, full-stack development, database design, user training

services.title: Beat Licensing / Custom Music
services.for: Content creators, brands, short films, ads
services.includes: Non-exclusive license from existing catalog, or custom beat on request

steps.title: Chat
steps.desc: Tell me what you need via WhatsApp. Free, no commitment.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.desc: I'll send a clear scope, timeline, and price. No surprises.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: I keep you updated every 2–3 days. You always know where we are.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Deploy, test, hand over. Includes 30 days of post-launch support.

meta.homeTitle: Aldi Fahrizaldi — Web Developer & Music Producer
meta.homeDescription: Web developer and music producer from Banjarmasin. Building web apps with Nuxt, Laravel, and Tailwind.
meta.serviceDescription: Freelance landing pages, web apps, POS systems, and custom digital tools.
